option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/bg_base">
<!-- Background glow effect --> <View android:layout_width="400dp" android:layout_height="400dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="80dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_glow_blue" android:alpha="0.6"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/splash_content" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Lottie animation --> <com.airbnb.lottie.LottieAnimationView android:id="@+id/lottie_splash" android:layout_width="160dp" android:layout_height="160dp" app:lottie_autoPlay="true" app:lottie_loop="false" app:lottie_rawRes="@raw/email_sending" app:lottie_speed="1.2"/>
<!-- App name --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_app_name" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="32sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:alpha="0"/>
<!-- Tagline --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_tagline" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_tagline" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:alpha="0"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Version at bottom --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_version" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom|center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" android:text="Version 1.0.0" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:alpha="0"/>
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/bg_base">
<!-- Background glow effect --> <View android:layout_width="400dp" android:layout_height="400dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="80dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_glow_blue" android:alpha="0.6"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/splash_content" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Logo Image View --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_logo" android:tag="splash_icon" android:layout_width="160dp" android:layout_height="160dp" android:src="@drawable/logo" android:contentDescription="@string/app_name"/>
<!-- App name --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_app_name" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textSize="32sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:alpha="0"/>
<!-- Tagline --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_tagline" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_tagline" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:alpha="0"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Version at bottom --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_version" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom|center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" android:text="Version 1.0.0" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/text_hint" android:alpha="0"/>
</FrameLayout>
